meta.title: S4x19 Charity: Water Campaign
meta.description: 12 minutes on we selected Charity: Water for the S4x19 Giveback. It's a simple ICS, and we can fund a water project for a village and see the results. Includes Dale talking about it and powerful Charity: Water videos. Please give if you can. Our goal is $20K and the campaign ends on Jan 31st.
